GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: This file contains the metadata, events, and data for REDCap project "MCH Project".
GlobalVariables.redcap:ProjectNotes: A REDCap project for collecting records across maternal & child health

redcap:Surveys.title: Demographics
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

redcap:Surveys.title: Completion Data
redcap:Surveys.acknowledgement:
Thank you for taking the survey.

Have a nice day!
redcap:Surveys.response_limit_custom_text: Thank you for your interest; however, the survey is closed because the maximum number of responses has been reached.

ItemGroupDef.Name: Please provide the patient's weekly schedule for the activities below.

Question.TranslatedText: Has the patient given birth before?
How many times has the patient given birth?

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - no limit). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

ItemDef.Name: gym___0
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: Please provide the patient's weekly schedule for the activities below.

ItemDef.Name: gym___4
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: Please provide the patient's weekly schedule for the activities below.

Question.TranslatedText: Is patient taking any of the following medications? (check all that apply)

Decode.TranslatedText: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
Did not wish to continue in study
